summary: Tested all Contacts system features: backend API endpoints (GET /contacts, POST /contacts/upsert, PATCH /contacts/{id}, GET /contacts/{id}/deals), Contacts page UI (datatable, stats bar, search, filter tabs, Export CSV, ContactDetailPanel), and Dashboard DetailPanel (Add to Pipeline / Save for Review buttons). Fixed critical bug: /api/stats endpoint was missing its @api_router.get('/stats') decorator, causing dashboard to throw 'Request failed' runtime errors and the table to fail to open deal detail panels.

critical.issue: Missing @api_router.get('/stats') decorator on get_stats function — endpoint returned 404, causing React error boundary to show 'Uncaught runtime errors: Request failed' on dashboard, blocking DetailPanel from opening

issues: ProductTour tooltip persists even after setting localStorage('vc_tour_dismissed', 'true') — requires value '1' not 'true'. Minor UX concern but does not block functionality when using correct key.

critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: server.py line ~1405 — get_stats() function was missing @api_router.get('/stats') decorator, making it an unregistered route returning 404. Dashboard calls /api/stats twice on load; both failing caused React error boundary to trigger and prevent DetailPanel from rendering.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — Contacts page, filters, search, Export CSV, ContactDetailPanel (notes, tags, status change), Dashboard DetailPanel Add to Pipeline / Save for Review all working

test_credentials: JWT: test@futurefrontiercapital.vc, localStorage key vc_token. Tour localStorage key is vc_tour_dismissed='1' (not 'true').
seed_data_creation: Test contacts created: test_alice_contacts@example.com (TEST_AlphaTech, In Pipeline) and test_review_contact@example.com (TEST_AlphaTech, In Review) during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Contacts APIs and UI working. Critical fix applied: /api/stats missing decorator. Dashboard DetailPanel Add to Pipeline and Save for Review buttons tested and working (toast shown on success). Contacts page: stats bar, table, search, filter tabs, Export CSV, ContactDetailPanel (notes, tags, status) all functional. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_contacts.py (10 tests). Use localStorage.setItem('vc_tour_dismissed', '1') to dismiss ProductTour when testing dashboard.
rca_of_the_issue: Root cause: In server.py, the get_stats() function (lines ~1405-1426) was defined as a plain async function without the @api_router.get('/stats') route decorator. This meant FastAPI never registered it as an HTTP endpoint. Every call to /api/stats returned 404. The Dashboard component calls /api/stats in a Promise.all on load; both calls failing caused React's error boundary to display 'Uncaught runtime errors: Request failed' and prevented the deals table from becoming interactive. Fix: added @api_router.get('/stats') decorator above the function definition.
